top_signals.title: Usercentrics Appoints Pawan Hegde as COO and Promotes Elena Ignatova to CPTO
top_signals.summary: Usercentrics, a leading data privacy technology company, today announced the appointment of Pawan Hegde as Chief Operating Officer and the promotion of Elena Ignatova to Chief Product and Technology Officer (CPTO). Both appointments accelerate the company’s U.S. expansion and mark a new phase of growth as Usercentrics scales its platform to meet the demands of [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
